steps.title: Use the formula for mean of combined data
steps.content:
The mean of data set C is:
$$\text{Mean of C} = \frac{\text{Sum of A + Sum of B}}{120}$$
To find the sums, use Sum = Mean × Count:
  • Data set A: $72 \times 30 = 2160$ meters
  • Data set B: $48 \times 70 = 3360$ meters
  • Total sum: $2160 + 3360 = 5520$ meters
